data.title: Binance officially launched a community questioning campaign and will select 5 questions for answer
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance officially released the "AskBinance" theme tweet on the X platform to solicit community questions, covering products, technology, marketing, etc. Community users can send questions in the comments before 4:00 on February 24 (UTC+8), and the official will select 5 questions to answer.

data.title: Gate.io APP Innovation Zone launches "Logo Mode" to improve Meme screening capabilities
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Gate.io APP Innovation Zone has been upgraded and launched a new "Logo Mode", which aims to help users identify popular Meme Logos in a more interesting way and instantly grasp the culture and narrative behind Meme.
It is reported that the Gate.io Innovation Zone is committed to integrating the advantages of spot trading and on-chain trading to lower the technical threshold for users to participate in on-chain projects. Users do not need to operate Web3 wallets or manage private keys. They can directly participate in hot projects on the chain with a Gate.io account and capture early investment opportunities faster.

data.title: Impact Of Economic Indicators On Bitcoin's Performance
data.description:
According to Odaily, Matrixport's weekly report titled "How Liquidity and Macroeconomic Indicators Affect Bitcoin" highlights several factors influencing Bitcoin's market dynamics. During U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen's tenure, the Treasury shifted its debt issuance strategy towards short-term Treasury bills over long-term bonds. This approach kept long-term bond yields stable, reducing the appeal of fixed-income assets and driving investors towards high-yield options like Bitcoin and stocks. The increased liquidity bolstered risk appetite, supporting Bitcoin's bullish momentum. However, with Scot Bessent taking over the Treasury, this strategy might reverse, potentially increasing yields, tightening liquidity, and reducing demand for risk assets. Investors are advised to closely monitor the Treasury's issuance policy as it significantly impacts liquidity and market sentiment.

The report also identifies the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) as a crucial macroeconomic factor affecting Bitcoin's price volatility. A stronger dollar tightens global liquidity, diminishing the appeal of risk assets like Bitcoin. Additionally, inflation data plays a significant role in Bitcoin's price trends. The Consumer Price Index (CPI) and Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) are key inflation indicators monitored by the Federal Reserve. Lower-than-expected CPI data suggests cooling inflation, which may prompt the Federal Reserve to adopt a more hawkish policy stance, increasing market liquidity and risk appetite, thus creating a favorable environment for Bitcoin.

Another critical macroeconomic indicator is the global money supply (M2), which measures the total amount of money in circulation, including cash, deposits, and other liquid assets. When M2 expands, financial system liquidity increases, boosting investment capital. This excess liquidity typically leads to increased risk appetite among investors, driving demand for risk assets like Bitcoin. Conversely, when M2 contracts, liquidity tightens, challenging speculative investments. By the end of 2023, the M2 supply ceased contracting, helping Bitcoin surpass $40,000. If the Federal Reserve resumes increasing M2, Bitcoin could experience another liquidity-driven rally. However, if M2 grows too rapidly, inflation may rise, forcing the Federal Reserve to tighten monetary policy, which would be unfavorable for Bitcoin. The ideal scenario for Bitcoin is moderate M2 growth without excessive inflation, ensuring liquidity and stable economic conditions.

data.title: LBank has launched IMG U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the IMG U-based perpetual contract at 12:20 (SGT) on February 21, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: Matrixport: Bitcoin's rally may face short-term pressure, investors should pay attention to relevant policies of the U.S. Treasury Department
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport released a weekly report on the X platform, "How Liquidity and Macroeconomic Indicators Affect Bitcoin", saying: "During the tenure of Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, the U.S. Treasury adjusted its debt issuance strategy, preferring short-term Treasury bills (T-bills) rather than long-term bonds. With fewer long-term bonds issued, Treasury yields remained stable, reducing the attractiveness of fixed-income assets and driving investors to high-yield options such as Bitcoin and stocks. The additional liquidity has enhanced risk appetite, further supporting Bitcoin's bullish momentum. However, with Scot Bessent at the helm of the Treasury, this strategy may be reversed. Resuming the issuance of more long-term bonds may increase yields, tighten liquidity and weaken demand for risky assets. If financial conditions tighten, Bitcoin's recent gains may face pressure. Investors should pay close attention to the Treasury's issuance policy as it is a major driver of liquidity and market sentiment." "The U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) is another major macroeconomic factor that affects Bitcoin price fluctuations. DXY measures the strength of the U.S. dollar relative to a basket of foreign currencies. The stronger the dollar and the tighter global liquidity, the less attractive risk assets such as Bitcoin." “Inflation data also plays an important role in influencing Bitcoin price movements. The Consumer Price Index (CPI) and Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) are key inflation indicators that the Federal Reserve watches. Lower-than-expected CPI data indicates cooling inflation, which could prompt the Fed to take a more hawkish policy stance. This in turn would increase market liquidity and risk appetite, creating a bullish environment that favors Bitcoin.” “Another key macro indicator is the (global) money supply (M2), which measures the total amount of money circulating in the economy, including cash, deposits, and other liquid assets. When M2 expands, liquidity in the financial system increases, allowing for more investment capital. This excess liquidity typically leads to increased risk appetite among investors, driving up demand for risky assets like Bitcoin. Conversely, when M2 contracts, liquidity tightens and speculative investments encounter difficulties. At the end of 2023, the M2 supply stops contracting, helping Bitcoin to re-cross $40,000. If the Fed starts increasing M2 again, Bitcoin could see another liquidity-driven rally. However, if M2 If it grows too fast, inflation could rise, forcing the Fed to tighten monetary policy, which is bad for Bitcoin. The ideal scenario for Bitcoin is a moderate growth in M2 without excessive inflation, thus ensuring liquidity and stable economic conditions.”

data.title: OSL: Hong Kong is becoming a safe haven for global capital to deploy Web3 with its "strong regulatory certainty + technological neutrality"
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: In the panel discussion on "Trends of Digital Assets in China and the United States under Trump's New Deal" at the "Event: Crypto 2025: Decoding the New Era of Digital Economy Reshaped by AI, MEME, and ETF" forum, OSL Institutional Product Director Hoi Chan predicted that the development of tokenized funds in Hong Kong will accelerate in 2025, and blockchain technology will be widely used in traditional financial products to improve transparency and liquidity. Hong Kong's "strong regulatory certainty + technical neutrality" characteristics are making it a safe haven for global funds to deploy Web3.
Hoi Chan pointed out that Hong Kong's policy support and improved regulatory framework have injected confidence into the market and are expected to attract global investors to participate, especially the lowering of the threshold for cross-border investment. Combined with Hong Kong as an international financial center, it is expected to play a key role in the field of digital assets.

data.title: AB Set to Launch on BitMart Exchange, Expanding Global Trading Channels
data.description:
AB DAO has announced that the AB token will soon be listed on BitMart Exchange, further expanding its global trading network, enhancing liquidity, and accelerating the worldwide growth of the AB ecosystem. This milestone will provide users with a seamless and secure trading experience while driving broader adoption of AB in the Web3 space.

As a leading global cryptocurrency exchange, BitMart offers users a secure and efficient trading environment worldwide. The listing of AB on BitMart will enable more users to trade, invest, and actively participate in the AB ecosystem.

This listing is part of AB DAO’s global expansion strategy, with AB tokens being integrated into more major exchanges to expand utility and accelerate ecosystem growth.

In addition to BitMart.com, users will also be able to trade $AB on HTX (htx.com), MEXC (mexc.com), and 4E (eeee.com).
